entries.text: Hi, I'm calling to check on some
Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.
Oh, actually, this is Linda Martinez. I'm a new patient.
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Maria?
Thanks for letting me know. Linda, I can help you get started as a new patient.
Yes, I'd like to know your office hours, especially on weekdays.
How can I assist you today? Are you looking to schedule your first appointment, or do you have another question?
Our clinic is open Monday, Tuesday, and Thursday from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m., Wednesday from 12 p.m. to 7 p.m., and Friday from 9 a.m. to 12 p.m.
Thanks. Do you have any Saturday hours, or evenings besides Wednesday?
Let me know if you need more details or want to schedule an appointment.
We are not open on Saturdays.
And the only evening hours are on Wednesdays when we're open until 7 p.m.
Thanks. Could you tell me your exact location or address?
If you need a specific time, I can help you find the closest available slot.
That's perfect, thank you. I think that covers everything I needed. Appreciate your help, goodbye.
Our clinic is located at 1234 Recovery Way, Suite 200, Austin. If you need directions or more details, just let me know.
